title: streptolirion volubile subsp. khasianum
intro: Streptolirion volubile subsp. khasianum is an orchid species native to the Himalayas, characterized by its unique, tubular flowers and climbing habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Streptolirion volubile subsp. khasianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
